base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of mountain_bg_underground_variant — a background_layer (parallax_single) from 1985 super mario bros. Same composition, underground palette — darker blues + muted cloud colors. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Same composition, underground palette — darker blues + muted cloud colors; used in below-ground stages
